meaning: vt.对(不同产品、劳务)作分类交易 vi.(将一揽子交易中各部分)分类定价
examples: After getting the results, we convened to try to unbundle the mandate of Dempsey. We were disappointed, very disappointed.
Application infrastructure virtualization (sometimes referred to as application fabrics) unbundle an application from a physical OS and hardware.
Pack Light - as airlines move to unbundle services, travelers can minimize any costs by packing and checking the least number of bags as possible.
By contrast, there is no obvious reason to unbundle narrative books into individual chapters or paragraphs.
The aim is to unbundle some of these larger contracts and make more work available to smaller companies.
